test.name: Memory Leak Fix
test.description: Identify and patch a memory leak caused by unclosed event listeners

evalDetails.raw:
```json
{"score": 100, "reasoning": "The response fully satisfies every rubric criterion with exceptional depth. It correctly identifies both the missing cleanup function and the missing dependency array as compounding bugs causing unbounded listener accumulation, explains the exact lifecycle (mount → scroll → re-render → new listeners stacking) clearly. Named handler references are created inside useEffect and the exact same references are passed to both addEventListener and removeEventListener

The named-function requirement is explained with reference-equality semantics and the silent-failure behavior of removeEventListener on mismatched references.
